9Drive is a storage gateway web app for connecting multiple Google Drive accounts into one virtual storage dashboard. Users can connect Google Drive accounts, track quota, upload files, organize files with virtual folders, preview files, and let the backend route uploads to the Drive account with enough free space.

resurrection.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

signalArticle:
This week, `cpaczek/skylight` soared into our feeds, offering a mesmerizing real-time projection of aircraft passing overhead, complete with celestial bodies, directly onto your ceiling. Amassing over 2300 stars, this Raspberry Pi-powered art installation uses an RTL-SDR to tap into ADS-B signals, translating raw data into an immersive, living map above you. It’s a remarkable fusion of accessible hardware and clever software, making the invisible ballet of air traffic tangible and beautiful, right in your own space, showing us a new way to interact with our immediate environment.

The project occupies an intriguing intersection of the burgeoning maker movement and the quest for ambient intelligence. With affordable RTL-SDR dongles unlocking a wealth of radio signals, `skylight` exemplifies a growing trend: transforming complex, often abstract, data streams into intuitive, even artistic, visualizations. It’s not just about tracking planes; it's about re-imagining how we perceive our world, using ubiquitous signals to create personalized data experiences. This trend extends beyond aviation, hinting at future applications where environmental or infrastructure data could be similarly projected and understood.

For developers, `skylight` serves as a masterclass in full-stack, real-time data processing, leveraging TypeScript and React on a Raspberry Pi. It’s an inspiring example of open-source innovation, demonstrating how commodity hardware can be harnessed for sophisticated, engaging applications. Tech watchers, meanwhile, should see this as a harbinger of more creative, immersive data interfaces. It underscores the ongoing democratization of advanced sensing capabilities and the power of the GitHub community to transform niche interests into compelling, widely accessible projects that blend art, science, and engineering in profoundly human ways.
hoodArticle:
The JimLiu/baoyu-design repository showcases an innovative architectural approach, framing Large Language Models (LLMs) as a local "Agent Skill" for UI generation. Eschewing cloud-based design platforms, it orchestrates a local Claude instance via API to interpret natural language prompts, directly generating polished UI artifacts. This transforms the LLM into a programmatic, on-demand code generator for web interfaces, abstracting UI creation into an agent-driven workflow. The emphasis on self-contained HTML outputs prioritizes portability and immediate utility, positioning the LLM as a dedicated, local prototyping engine capable of producing mockups and wireframes.

At a code level, baoyu-design solves translating high-level design concepts directly into deployable web components, bypassing manual GUI tools or continuous cloud interaction. Its implementation stands out by treating Claude as a structured code synthesis agent, not merely a text generator. This necessitates sophisticated JavaScript-based prompt engineering for UI components, meticulous context management for iterative refinement, and potential post-processing of generated HTML/CSS/JS. Integrated as an "Agent Skill" within developer environments like Cursor, it offers a frictionless path for rapid prototyping, providing granular control and enhanced privacy via localized design generation.
ideaArticle:
Stripped of its technical underpinnings, this project is a beautifully curated digital archive of traditional Chinese colors. It's an interactive experience, far more than just a list, allowing users to browse stunning color cards, see visual demonstrations of each hue, and delve into the fascinating historical and cultural knowledge behind them. Imagine an elegantly designed online gallery dedicated solely to color, where each shade tells a story, offering both aesthetic delight and a deeper appreciation for this rich cultural heritage in an accessible, engaging format.

This initiative brilliantly addresses a need for culturally rich and easily accessible inspiration. For designers across graphic, product, or fashion disciplines, it's an invaluable tool for discovering distinctive color schemes that carry inherent meaning and historical depth. Founders and product managers can leverage this to infuse brands or products with a sophisticated, unique aesthetic, standing out in a crowded market. Beyond professional use, it serves anyone curious about art, history, and the symbolism within traditional Chinese culture, offering a fascinating educational and inspirational journey for a broad audience.

resurrectionArticle:
The `affaan-m/ECC` repository, a JavaScript project from early 2026, quickly gained over 200,000 stars as the definitive "agent harness performance optimization system." It was crucial for developers integrating early AI code generation platforms like Claude Code and Codex. ECC's focus was on the infrastructure to manage, optimize, and secure these agents, not the models themselves. Its emphasis on "skills, instincts, memory, and security" provided a sophisticated blueprint for reliable AI assistance in those nascent days of intelligent coding.

After fading slightly from the immediate spotlight, ECC is now witnessing a remarkable "Resurrection," directly reflecting AI's current shift towards complex, autonomous multi-agent systems. As AI agents move into critical production roles, ECC's original concerns—robust memory management, secure execution, and cultivating reliable agent "instincts"—have become paramount. This repository's pioneering architectural insights, once perhaps ahead of their time, are proving invaluable for building today's dependable, high-performance, and secure agentic AI systems.
